name: Kailua Farmers' Market
tagline: Thursday evening market run by the same folks behind KCC — 20 years of Hawaii-grown-only produce, mochi, and street corn.
parking: Free parking at Kailua Town Center
hours: Thursdays 4pm–7pm sharp. Alarm sounds at 7pm and all sales stop immediately
bestTime: Arrive before 5pm — popular items like Mochi Aulelei Hawaii taro mochi and Nozawa Farms street corn sell out early
talkStory: Run by the Hawaii Farm Bureau for 20+ years at 609 Kailua Rd, this market strictly enforces its Hawaii-grown-only rule -- every product must be raised, grown, or made in the islands. Nozawa Farms street corn and Mochi Aulelei Hawaii taro mochi sell out first, so arrive before 5pm. The 7pm closing alarm is legendary -- when it sounds, all sales stop immediately regardless of the line. Local families, military families from the nearby base, and Kailua lifers all mix here.
